title: VitiScience node telemetry
description: One MQTT telemetry message published by a sensing node to vitiscience/nodes/<node_id>/telemetry. Authoritative companion to data-contract.md.

node_id.description: Unique node id; must match the <node_id> segment of the topic.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 / RFC3339 UTC instant. Optional; Telegraf timestamps on arrival if absent.

temperature_c.description: Air temperature in degrees Celsius (SHT31 operating range).

rssi_dbm.description: Link signal strength in dBm (optional, usually negative).
